# Releases and Operations

## Use this when

- Preparing or reviewing release-related changes.
- Working on nightly/build orchestration and release metadata.
- Coordinating versioned data publication behavior.

## Operational guidance

- Distinguish `nightly` builds from versioned `stable` releases.
- Keep release notes updated for user-visible and developer-visible changes.
- Validate that docs and data access references reflect current release behavior.

## Related processes

- Running a release and documenting release artifacts.
- Nightly and specialized data build workflows.
- Infrastructure and deployment docs affecting build reliability.

## Canonical sources

- `docs/dev/run_a_release.rst`
- `docs/dev/nightly_data_builds.rst`
- `docs/dev/ferceqr_data_builds.rst`
- `docs/dev/existing_data_updates.rst`
- `docs/dev/infrastructure_as_code.rst`
- `docs/release_notes.rst`
